title: Self-directed IRA for a private real-estate syndication
summary: Considering moving part of my IRA into a self-directed custodian to invest in a multifamily syndication. Need to confirm the deal is allowed and avoids prohibited transactions.
advisor_questions: Does this trigger prohibited-transaction or UBIT rules?
next_action: Bring "Self-directed IRA for a private real-estate syndication" to your CPA/attorney for review before acting.
